enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Hosanna'?

'Hosanna' expresses deep emotions of love and devotion, reflecting the protagonist's feelings in the movie.

What is the plot context of 'Hosanna' in the movie?

The song plays during a pivotal moment in Vinnaithaandi Varuvaaaya, highlighting the romantic tension between the lead characters.

Who are the singers of 'Hosanna'?

The song features the talented voices of Blaaze, Suzanne D'Mello, and Vijay Prakash.

Who composed the music for 'Hosanna'?

The music for 'Hosanna' was composed by the legendary AR Rahman.

When was 'Hosanna' released?

'Hosanna' was released on January 12, 2010.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'Hosanna', the characters experience a whirlwind of emotions as they navigate the complexities of love. The song beautifully captures the essence of longing and desire, making it a standout moment in Vinnaithaandi Varuvaaaya. With its enchanting melody and poignant lyrics by Thamarai, the track resonates deeply with listeners. The collaboration of talented singers adds to the song's charm, evoking feelings of romance and nostalgia.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Hosanna from Vinnaithaandi Varuvaaaya is a mesmerizing blend of soulful melodies and heartfelt lyrics that captures the essence of love and longing. The unique collaboration of Blaaze, Suzanne D'Mello, and Vijay Prakash, under the masterful direction of AR Rahman, creates an unforgettable listening experience. This song perfectly encapsulates the romantic vibe of the film, making it a must-listen for fans of Tamil music.
stanzaMeanings: You have broken my heart, it hurts.
You will give me your heart, you will break it.

At that moment, at that time, seeing the light, something happened. Oh, the sky has changed, all the troubles have gone away. Hosanna, since you came to my door, Hosanna, without doing anything else, I am going away, I am searching for my truth after she left.
Oh...sanna... I have come towards life. Oh...sanna... I am standing near death. Oh...sanna... if I say, I mean love. Oh...sanna...
Rap: Everybody wants to know, be like, be like, I really want to be here with you. Is that enough to say that we are made for each other? Is all that *Hosanna* true?

Hosanna... be there when you call, I will be there. Hosanna... be the life I share my whole life with. I never want to be the same. It's time we rearrange. I take a step, you take a step, and I am calling out to you...
Hello... Hello... Hello... Hosanna. Oh... Hosanna... Hosanna... Oh... Oh... Hosanna... Hosanna... Oh... Oh...

Colors, colors, flowers have bloomed everywhere, the sound is echoing here and there. Oh, the whispers have started to go. Hosanna - did the flowers bloom? Hosanna - did the clouds touch you? I am like a child in the cradle, I will keep you close and cherish you.
Hello... Hello... Hello... Hosanna, love me. Hosanna, unite with me. Hosanna, when I say this... Oh... Hosanna...
You have broken my heart, it hurts. You will give me your heart, you will break it.
